untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'price at 1 standard deviation from 10-period MA' which requires Bollinger Bands or custom std dev calculation. Allowed indicators lack raw standard deviation bands. Also 'pullback from recent high/low within last 5 bars' requires multi-bar lookback logic not expressible in single 3-field conditions. Entry on 'first touch of extreme' is temporal/order-dependent and cannot be expressed in static indicator conditions.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction cannot be fully implemented without conditional logic. Mean-reversion structure attempted using MA crossovers as proxy, but original signal's statistical extremes and pullback definitions are not translatable with available indicators. Recommend: (1) Add bb_upper/bb_lower for 1-STD bands, (2) Add highest/lowest() functions for recent extremes, (3) Enable temporal order logic for 'first touch' semantics.
